note: Independent verification run: fresh clone + editable install of turboquant-pro on a Colab T4, comparing 4-bit key quantizer families (keys-only). per_channel_nf4 = per-channel asymmetric NF4; nvfp4_block16 = NVFP4 block-16 (hardware micro-scaling). Corroborates the per-channel-over-block-scaled keys finding.
